title: IntegrationSystem
description: An integration system configured in the Workday tenant, representing a deployed Studio integration or core connector configuration.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the integration system

descriptor.description: The display name of the integration system

integrationSystemName.description: The configured name of the integration system

isActive.description: Whether the integration system is currently active

lastRunDateTime.description: The date and time of the last successful execution

scheduleFrequency.description: The configured schedule frequency for automatic execution

notificationRecipients.description: Users or groups who receive notifications about integration events
